name: vscode-copilot-memory-board-workspace
description: Visualize and manage GitHub Copilot's long-term memory as an interactive board — available as a VS Code extension and standalone desktop app.
author: Memory Board Contributors

scripts.package:vsix: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.tmp/publish/vscode',{recursive:true})" && pnpm --filter @memory-board/core build && pnpm --filter @memory-board/gui build && pnpm --filter ./extensions/vscode run build:webview && pnpm --filter ./extensions/vscode run package
